title: Production MLOps for Trained Models
shortSummary: A classical ML operations lane focused on registries, monitoring, retraining, and deployment discipline for trained models.
whyItMatters: This module keeps the classical MLOps path visible without pretending it is the only modern AI engineering story. It is here for builders who still want the registry-monitor-retrain deployment track in a clear package.
coreConcepts: Monitoring drift and model health over time
Where classical MLOps overlaps with frontier AI platform work
